text: A veteran of the Great Spire wars, you carry a shield dented by dragon fire and a heart heavy with the memories of fallen comrades. You seek justice in a lawless land, driven by a code of honor that most people find outdated.

Raised in the shadow of the Aether-works, you learned to breathe in magic as easily as air. Your exile was not a punishment, but a necessity after you discovered a secret that the High Technomancers wanted buried.

A mountain-born soul who feels more at home among the stone and the clouds than in any city. You travel to the lowlands to find the truth behind a prophecy that claims your tribe is the key to stopping the coming storm.
